optionA.text: Petiole of two segments (petiole and postpetiole)
Antenna with a very distinctive 2-segmented club; stinger present

optionB.text: Antenna with or without club; if clubbed, never as in option A

optionA.text: Eyes very large, spanning nearly 2/3 of the head; body elongated and slender; arboreal

optionB.text: Eyes normal size; body flattened dorsoventrally; head square in dorsal view; arboreal

optionA.text: Mesosoma with more than two pointed or blunt spines

optionB.text: Mesosoma with two or four pointed spines on the propodeum

optionA.text: Four pairs of clearly pointed spines on the mesosoma; polymorphic workers (leaf-cutter ants)

optionB.text: More than four pairs of blunt spines on the mesosoma

optionA.text: Head with auricles (ear-like structures) partly hiding the antennae; mesosoma with blunt spines; curl into a ball in alcohol

optionB.text: Head without auricles, with spines or tubercles at vertices; mesosoma and gaster with tubercles, teeth and blunt spines

optionA.text: Heart-shaped gaster in dorsal view; postpetiole articulates with the dorsal part of the gaster; generally arboreal

optionB.text: Gaster not heart-shaped; postpetiole articulates with the anterior part of the gaster

optionA.text: Very elongated mandibles; very small size
Head and mesosoma with very evident reticulate sculpturing and striae; petiole with short steep anterior face at right angle to peduncle

optionB.text: Antennal club of two or three segments; only part of head and mesosoma sculptured, or head smooth

optionA.text: Three-segmented club; cutter-type mandibles; strongly discontinuous mesosoma; polymorphic workers (soldiers with large heads)

optionB.text: Two-segmented club; 11-segmented antenna; two spines at end of mesosoma; striae on head; reddish color

optionA.text: Body with smooth integument on at least one tagma

optionB.text: Body with very pronounced striae (parallel grooves) or large, pronounced foveae on all tagmata

optionA.text: Antenna with two- or three-segmented club; arboreal
Head, antennal scape, mesosoma and gaster covered in thick, spaced, erect setae

optionB.text: Mesosoma with fine setae or hairless

optionA.text: Continuous, convex mesosoma profile; fine setae sparse to abundant; highly variable in size

optionB.text: Discontinuous mesosoma profile; very few or no setae on mesosoma
Propodeum well rounded, without protuberances; streamlined ants
